name: Spider-Man
description: Peter Benjamin Parker was bitten by a radioactive spider at age fifteen, gaining superhuman strength, wall-crawling abilities, and a precognitive spider-sense. Guided by the principle that with great power comes great responsibility, Spider-Man patrols New York City as its friendly neighborhood protector. Mentored by Tony Stark and shaped by loss, Peter embodies the struggle of balancing extraordinary duty with ordinary life. He is widely considered the most relatable hero in the Marvel canon.
